# FluentCMS - AI-Powered Blazor Headless CMS

## Overview

FluentCMS is an AI-powered, open-source Content Management System (CMS) built with ASP.NET Core and Blazor. It provides a modern, headless architecture that enables seamless integration with modern development tools and platforms.

## Features

- **AI-Powered Content Generation**: Utilize natural language processing and machine learning algorithms to generate high-quality content
- **Headless Architecture**: Build scalable, flexible applications using a headless CMS that separates front and back ends
- **Sitebuilder Interface**: Create user-friendly interfaces that empower users to design without coding knowledge
- **Intelligent Suggestions**: Leverage AI to suggest relevant content ideas based on audience preferences
- **Adaptive Design**: Optimize layouts and themes based on user behavior and device types
- **Personalized Experience**: Provide personalized content recommendations and tailored search results
- **Seamless Integration**: Integrate with popular tools using RESTful APIs and webhooks
- **Advanced Analytics**: Gain insights into user behavior and content performance

## Technology Stack

- ASP.NET Core
- Blazor (Server & Client)
- Tailwind CSS
- Flowbite UI
- C# / .NET
